recommendations.title: Werewolf of London
recommendations.overview: A strange animal attack turns a botanist into a bloodthirsty monster.

recommendations.title: The Monster Club
recommendations.overview: A vampire attacks a horror author on the street and then invites him to a nearby club as a gesture of gratitude, which turns out to be a meeting place for assorted creatures of the night. The vampire then regales him with three stories, each interspe

recommendations.title: The Return
recommendations.overview: After the death of his father, a brilliant college student returns to his family home where he learns that the horrors from his childhood aren't as dead and gone as he once thought.

recommendations.title: Matriarch
recommendations.overview: Afflicted with a mysterious disease after surviving an overdose, a woman returns to her childhood home to confront her personal demons but instead discovers a real one.

recommendations.title: Are You Here
recommendations.overview: When Steve Dallas, a womanizing local weatherman, hears that his off-the-grid best friend Ben Baker has lost his estranged father, the two return to Ben's childhood home. Once there, they discover Ben has inherited the family fortune, and the ill-equ

recommendations.title: Vampire Hunter D
recommendations.overview: In a far-future time ruled by the supernatural, a young girl requests the help of a vampire hunter to kill the vampire who has bitten her and thus prevent her from becoming a vampire herself.

recommendations.title: Possum
recommendations.overview: A disgraced children's puppeteer returns to his childhood home and is forced to confront his wicked stepfather and the secrets that have tortured him his entire life.

recommendations.title: Dark Light
recommendations.overview: A woman returns to her family home and discovers it to be inhabited by monsters.

recommendations.title: Tamara Drewe
recommendations.overview: A young newspaper writer returns to her hometown in the English countryside, where her childhood home is being prepped for sale.

recommendations.title: Jeruzalem
recommendations.overview: When a couple of American young adults fly to Israel to visit the city of Jerusalem, a biblical nightmare falls upon the city.
